scripts.build: npm run build -w kata-1 && .\scripts\dotnet.cmd build "kata-2/api/src/TaskPanel.Api/TaskPanel.Api.csproj" && npm run build -w kata-2/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w kata-1 && .\scripts\dotnet.cmd build "kata-2/api/tests/TaskPanel.Api.Tests/TaskPanel.Api.Tests.csproj" --no-restore -m:1 /p:UseSharedCompilation=false && .\scripts\dotnet.cmd test "kata-2/api/tests/TaskPanel.Api.Tests/TaskPanel.Api.Tests.csproj" --no-build --no-restore -m:1 /p:UseSharedCompilation=false && python -m unittest discover -s kata-4/tests -p "test_*.py"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w kata-1 && .\scripts\dotnet.cmd build "kata-2/api/src/TaskPanel.Api/TaskPanel.Api.csproj" --no-restore && npm run typecheck -w kata-2/web
